commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=f5eb8a751d14de1c9b542dd874b54567a8371254)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a SQLite-backed `gateway_restart_audit` table and threads restart audit metadata through restart requests, safe restart coordination, `/restart`, config writes, update runs, and the gateway restart tool.

PR surface: Source +227, Tests +24, Generated +18. Total +269 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: the PR inserts into a new audit table, while current database initialization executes a generated schema module that does not define that table. I did not run tests because this review is read-only, but the repository's generator/check contract makes the failure path clear.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review should require the schema-generation fix, real behavior proof, and maintainer acceptance of the durable audit storage direction before merge; missing contributor proof makes repair automation insufficient.

target.title: Persist gateway restart audit events
target.body:
## Summary

- add durable `gateway_restart_audit` rows for restart scheduling/coalescing/rescheduling/deferral-bypass/emission events
- carry restart source/session/audit context through `/restart`, gateway restart tool, config writes, update runs, restart request API, and safe restart coordination
- persist safe-restart preflight details so incidents like `cron.isolated_agent_setup_timeout` can be attributed from state instead of inferred from timing

## Motivation

A gateway restart forensic investigation found an internal safe-restart request could only be reconstructed by correlating a cron isolated-agent setup timeout with the default 300s restart deferral and later `SIGUSR1`. This patch leaves a durable audit trail at request time.

## Testing

- `pnpm format:check src/agents/tools/gateway-tool.ts src/auto-reply/reply/commands-session.ts src/gateway/server-methods/config-write-flow.ts src/gateway/server-methods/restart.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/restart.ts src/gateway/server-methods/update.ts src/infra/restart-coordinator.test.ts src/infra/restart-coordinator.ts src/infra/restart.ts src/state/openclaw-state-db.generated.d.ts src/state/openclaw-state-schema.sql`
- `pnpm lint:kysely`
- `pnpm lint:tmp:tsgo-core-boundary`
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `pnpm tsgo:core:test`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.infra.config.ts src/infra/restart.test.ts src/infra/restart-coordinator.test.ts --maxWorkers=1`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway-methods.config.ts src/gateway/server-methods/restart.test.ts --maxWorkers=1`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway-server.config.ts src/gateway/server-cron.test.ts src/gateway/server-restart-deferral.test.ts --maxWorkers=1`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents-tools.config.ts src/agents/tools/gateway-tool.test.ts src/agents/openclaw-gateway-tool.test.ts --maxWorkers=1`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.auto-reply-reply.config.ts src/auto-reply/reply/commands-session-restart.test.ts --maxWorkers=1`
target.author: anyech
